signals.headline: Bitcoin 2026 Conference Opens April 27 with Institutional Keynotes | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin 2026 Conference Opens April 27 with Institutional Keynotes | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Bitcoin 2026 Conference** is confirmed to open April 27 in Las Vegas with over 35,000 registered attendees and keynote presentations from BlackRock, Fidelity, and Goldman Sachs digital asset divisions[1]. Bitcoin is currently trading at $68,758[1].

Solana Price Consolidation Between $80-$95 | YES | MED confidence**
